# Cost Latency Optimization Packet Template

Use this template when the desk must hand work to another desk or implementation agent.

```yaml
workflow_mode:
current_stage: cost-latency-optimization-desk
capability_id:
user_goal:
acceptance_criteria:
risk_tier:
approval_state:
source_facts:
assumptions:
open_questions:
baseline_metrics:
traffic_profile:
provider_limits:
optimization_levers:
expected_impact:
quality_gates:
safety_gates:
grounding_gates:
cost_targets:
latency_targets:
throughput_targets:
cache_policy:
batching_policy:
routing_policy:
fallback_policy:
rollout_plan:
rollback_plan:
monitoring_requirements:
validation_gates:
hard_halts:
soft_gaps:
ready_to_continue:
downstream_handoff_targets:
```
